title: Chain Reaction
summary: Chain Reaction is a capstone project that simulates automated attacks inside a cloud (k8s) environment, using an AI decision loop to plan and execute multi-step attack sequences in real time.

title: Spender
summary: Spender is a self-hosted personal finance app that gives you full control of your spending data. Import bank statements, auto-categorize transactions, set budgets and savings goals, and get a clear Health Score that shows where you stand and what to improve.

title: Ohara
summary: Persistent memory with typed retrieval, conflict detection, and context injection for AI coding agents. A fork of Engram that adds typed memory, conflict detection, relation graphs, hybrid search, and context injection for multi-project, multi-agent workflows.

title: Digispark
summary: Explore Keystroke Injection attacks with the Digispark USB development board.
